descriptions: to encourage someone to put more effort into something or to not stop trying to do something
examples: James’ father urged him on from the side of the court.
highlighted_examples: James’ father [urged] him [on] from the side of the court.

descriptions: to use all of a supply of something
examples: I’ve used up all my holiday entitlement, and it’s only August.
highlighted_examples: I’ve [used] [up] all my holiday entitlement, and it’s only August.

descriptions: to make an activity or process begin
examples: The talks ushered in a new era of international co-operation.
highlighted_examples: The talks [ushered] [in] a new era of international co-operation.
